fluidlogistics.configuration.title: Fluid Logistics Configuration
fluidlogistics.configuration.compressedT: Maximum fluid amount the compressed storage tank can hold (in mB)
tooltip.fluidlogistics.alt_click_hint: Alt + Click a fluid container to request fluid
fluidlogistics.ponder.fluid_packager.tex: The Fluid Packager can package fluids from fluid tanks into fluid packages
When powered by a redstone signal, it extracts fluid from the tank and packages it into fluid packages
Fluid packages can be picked up and transported just like any other item
Placing a fluid package into the Fluid Packager will unpack it and inject the fluid into the fluid tank
The Fluid Packager cannot accept fluid packages that cannot be fully unpacked
fluidlogistics.ponder.fluid_packager_add: When placing a sign on the Fluid Packager...
Packaged fluid packages will carry a line of text with their address
Package filters route fluid packages based on their addresses
A Mechanical Saw can directly unpack fluid packages into compressed storage tanks
Besides filters, Freight Docks and Mailboxes can also route fluid packages
Check their Ponder interfaces to learn about their behavior
